title: The Baratie Is Thrown Into Chaos
description: On pages 18–18, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: While we still had no idea what was going on,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our ships sank one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And if it weren't for that storm that whisked us away,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even our main ship would've sunk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't even know how many of our ships managed to survive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's just too terrifying to believe as real...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't even want to think about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That Hawk-eyed Man whose glare is sharp enough to kill a man...! I don't! I don't want to think about him!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
